prompt: A node in my 3-node CockroachDB cluster has been down for 3 minutes. What recovery strategy should I use?
expected_output: wait for self-healing|node down less than 5 minutes|automatic recovery|not started yet

prompt: My cluster node ran out of disk space and the ballast file was deleted. What are the immediate recovery steps?
expected_output: delete ballast|delete old logs|add disk capacity|resize volume|restart node|recreate ballast

prompt: How do I validate that recovery was successful after restarting a dead node?
